name: traffic_server
explanation: Apache Traffic Server exposes metrics through the `stats_over_http` plugin at a single canonical path `/_stats`, returning a JSON document with a `global` key. The plugin's default port is 8080 (the same as the proxy by default; operators commonly bind it on the proxy port or remap it). The check just performs a GET and parses JSON — no credentials, no path enumeration. A generic HTTP-path probe that hits `http://%%host%%:8080/_stats` and validates the JSON shape (`global` key) is sufficient. Pattern B.
notes: Port 8080 is the default for both proxy and stats endpoint; some operators may remap the stats endpoint to a separate port.
